lines.gurmukhi: ਮਇਆ ਕਰੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: meaa karee pooran har raaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Sovereign Lord, the Perfect King, has shown His Mercy to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰੇ ਭਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke poore bhaag |
lines.english: Says Nanak, one whose destiny is perfect,
meditates on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, the Everlasting Husband. ||2||106||
He opens his loin-cloth, and spreads it out beneath him.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Without good deeds, liberation is not obtained.
The wealth of liberation is only obtained by meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Like a donkey, he gulps down all that comes his way. ||1||
he pulls out his knife, and demands donations. ||2||
With his mouth, he recites the Vedas in sweet musical measures,
He performs worship ceremonies, applies the ceremonial tilak mark to his forehead, and takes his ritual cleansing baths;
and yet he does not hesitate to take the lives of others. ||3||
Says Nanak, when God showers His Mercy,
even his heart becomes pure, and he contemplates God. ||4||107||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਿਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਬੈਸਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: thir ghar baisahu har jan piaare |
lines.english: Remain steady in the home of your own self, O beloved servant of the Lord.
The True Guru shall resolve all your affairs. ||1||Pause||
The Creator has preserved the honor of His servant. ||1||
The Transcendent Lord has struck down the wicked and the evil.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਦਿਸਾਹ ਸਾਹ ਸਭ ਵਸਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੀਨੇ ॥
lines.translit: baadisaah saah sabh vas kar deene |
lines.english: The kings and emperors are all under his power;
Meditate fearlessly on the Lord God.
he drinks deeply of the most sublime essence of the Ambrosial Naam. ||2||
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, this gift is given. ||3||
he grasps the Support of God, his Lord and Master. ||4||108||
Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਭਾਹਿ ਨ ਜਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate bhaeh na jalai |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, shall not be burned in the fire.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਨਹੀ ਛਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate maaeaa nahee chhalai |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, shall not be enticed by Maya.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਨਹੀ ਡੂਬੈ ਜਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate nahee ddoobai jalaa |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, shall not be drowned in water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਟਤ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhettat sang har har gun gaae | rahaau |
lines.english: Joining the Sangat, the Holy Congregation, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, Har, Har. ||Pause||
One who is attuned to the Lord, is prosperous and fruitful. ||1||
All fear is eradicated by Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਿਟੈ ਸਭ ਚਿੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate mittai sabh chintaa |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, is free of all anxieties.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਸੋ ਰਚੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਸਾਧ ਕਾ ਮੰਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har siau so rachai jis saadh kaa mantaa |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, is blessed with the Mantra of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਨਹੀ ਤ੍ਰਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate jam kee nahee traas |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, is not haunted by the fear of death.
One who is attuned to the Lord, sees all his hopes fulfilled. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਦੂਖੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate dookh na laagai |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, does not suffer in pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਨਸੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har sang raate bhram bhau nasai |3|
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, sees his doubts and fears run away. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਸਹਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raataa sehaj ghar vasai |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, dwells in the home of intuitive peace.
One who is attuned to the Lord, remains awake and aware, night and day.
One who is attuned to the Lord, has a pure and spotless reputation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਨ ਕਉ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak tin kau bal jaaee |
lines.english: Says Nanak, I am a sacrifice to those,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate mat aootam hoe |
lines.english: One who is attuned to the Lord, has the most sublime and exalted intellect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਨਾਹੀ ॥੪॥੧੦੯॥
lines.translit: jin kau prabh meraa bisarat naahee |4|109|
lines.english: Who do not forget my God. ||4||109||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
Through sincere efforts, the mind is made peaceful and calm.
Walking on the Lord's Way, all pains are taken away.
Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, supreme bliss is obtained. ||1||
Chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the mind becomes blissful.
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, misfortune disappears. ||Pause||
There is joy all around, and peace has come to my home.
My eyes are purified, beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨਿ ਮਸਤਕ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਹੀ ਪਰਸ ॥
lines.translit: dhan masatak charan kamal hee paras |
lines.english: Blessed is the forehead which touches His Lotus Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਟਹਲ ਸਫਲ ਇਹ ਕਾਂਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gobind kee ttehal safal ih kaaneaa |
lines.english: Working for the Lord of the Universe, the body becomes fruitful.
